authority_sources.name: PDE / PA Code / Federal education privacy and accessibility frameworks
authority_sources.note: This file is a structure template; authoritative citations live in docs and later compliance bundles.

compulsory_attendance.note: Populate with exact age/rules as a policy snapshot; keep changes versioned.

assessment_accountability.note: Populate with graduation / pathway logic for high school when used.

privacy_and_data.note: FERPA/COPPA behaviors captured via policy parameter sheet + access controls later.

digital_accessibility.note: Enforced via Delphi evaluations and publishing gates.

local_override_slots.name: district_or_school_overrides
local_override_slots.note: Sub-jurisdiction overrides hang here, e.g., US-PA-PhiladelphiaSD.
